new_value: {"notes":"Research summary: Preferred integration is Semtech UDP packet forwarder protocol (matches existing test vectors for RAK2287). Alternatives: FFI+bindgen to libloragw C lib (build with cc crate), pure-Rust spidev/gpio driver, or existing Rust crates (none mature). Update lichen-hal Concentrator impl and lichen-gateway config to support \"rak2287\" via UDP listener on 1700/1701. HAL traits already designed for it (configure_channels, current_channel, Concentrator trait). No code changes yet - this is research bead. Next: driver impl in subtask."}
